entities.name: GENOMICS ASSISTED PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: Tool used to speed up the development of improved crop varieties

entities.name: TRADITIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Conventional breeding approach used for disease resistance

entities.name: MARKER ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: Breeding approach using markers to select for specific traits

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist diseases

entities.name: MAJOR DISEASE RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Highly effective genes for disease resistance that are vulnerable to breakdown by pathogenic races

entities.name: PATHOGENIC RACES
entities.description: Variants of pathogens that can overcome major disease resistance genes

entities.name: MINOR GENE QUANTITATIVE RESISTANCE
entities.description: Durable plant resistance based on multiple minor genes, which is slow and challenging to breed

entities.name: MINOR QUANTITATIVE GENES
entities.description: Genes that contribute to quantitative disease resistance

entities.name: MOLECULAR PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: Plant breeding utilizing molecular tools and genomic information

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: An approach for predicting genotype performance to improve complex quantitative traits using whole genome data

entities.name: GENOTYPE PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The phenotypic expression of a plant's genetic makeup

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Genetically complex traits controlled by multiple genes

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The rate of improvement in a trait over successive generations of breeding

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME SEQUENCE DATA
entities.description: Comprehensive genetic data used to predict the breeding value of offspring

entities.name: BREEDING VALUE
entities.description: The genetic merit of an individual as estimated from genomic data

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME PREDICTION MODELS
entities.description: Models used in genomic selection to predict breeding values

entities.name: SELECTION METHODOLOGY
entities.description: The systematic approach used to select individuals for breeding

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of a crop, used as a benchmark for genomic selection implementation

entities.name: ECONOMICALLY IMPORTANT TRAITS
entities.description: Traits that provide significant economic value to agriculture

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME MARKER PROFILES
entities.description: Comprehensive sets of markers across the genome for breeding lines

entities.name: GS+
entities.description: A two-stream genomic selection and de novo GWAS model

entities.name: QR + R GENE
entities.description: Genomic selection for combining the highest level of quantitative resistance with R genes
